sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ مَرْيَمُ افْتِتَاحَ مَتْجَرٍ صَغِيرٍ لِلْحَلَوِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Merjem je odlučila otvoriti malu prodavnicu slatkiša.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam decided to open a small sweets shop.

sentences.arabic: دَرَسَتِ السُّوقَ جَيِّدًا قَبْلَ بَدْءِ مَشْرُوعِهَا الْخَاصِّ.
sentences.translation: Dobro je proučila tržište prije početka svog privatnog projekta.
sentences.translationEn: She studied the market well before starting her private project.

sentences.arabic: تُرِيدُ مَرْيَمُ أَنْ تُصْبِحَ سَيِّدَةَ أَعْمَالٍ نَاجِحَةً.
sentences.translation: Merjem želi postati uspješna poslovna žena.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam wants to become a successful businesswoman.
